servers.name: recipe-commerce-intelligence
servers.description: Extract ingredients and equipment from cooking video transcripts (YouTube URLs or raw text). Match ingredients to affiliate products on Amazon Associates, Williams-Sonoma, Instacart, and Thrive Market. Build ranked shopping lists by affiliate revenue potential.

tools.name: extract_recipe_ingredients
tools.description: Extract recipe name, ingredients (with quantity and unit), equipment, techniques, and cuisine type from a cooking video transcript.

tools.name: match_ingredients_to_products
tools.description: Match extracted ingredients to purchasable products with affiliate program, price range, commission rate, and substitutes.

tools.name: suggest_affiliate_products
tools.description: Build a ranked affiliate shopping list for a recipe, sorted by affiliate revenue potential. Equipment scores highest (Williams-Sonoma, 10% commission).
